positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a crescent moon rising over a stylized silhouette of a mountain range and a calm body of water. Incorporate deep indigo blues, celestial gold accents, and creamy off-white tones. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, with clean, strong black outlines (line art style). The overall aesthetic should feel cosmic and dreamy, emphasizing geometric shapes and peaceful harmony. Designed for screen printing on fabric, ensuring solid color blocks and minimal gradients, maintaining high contrast and crisp edges. Vector art quality, graphic design.
